style_effects: Subtle heat haze ripples around Psyduck's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor; glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along its seam lines like circuitry, accompanied by shimmering metallic dust particles drifting in slow motion. Its aura is a cool, intense cerulean light that casts sharp, geometric shadows, illuminating the scene with a cold, metallic glow. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
